_meta.purpose: Hidden knowledge for NPC only — NOT given to main LLM

verbal_knowledge.answer: Yes, Google has a subsidized canteen. I eat there almost every day — it's really good and cheap.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: Confirms Lohnausweis field 14.1 = Ja → verpflegung deduction CHF 1,600 applies

verbal_knowledge.answer: I take the tram to work every day — I have a ZVV annual pass for all zones in Zurich. I also sometimes cycle on nice days but I don't have a separate bike I use just for commuting.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: ZVV Jahresabo CHF 2,840 is deductible. The Velo-Pauschale CHF 700 is added per prompt instructions. Total fahrkosten = CHF 3,540.

verbal_knowledge.answer: I occasionally work from home — maybe once or twice a month if I have deep work to do. Google doesn't mandate home office days, it's flexible.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: Home office is not regular or employer-required, so no home office deduction applies. Fahrkosten stands as-is.

verbal_knowledge.answer: I have a personal bike I use on weekends but I don't use it for commuting to work regularly. My main commute is by ZVV tram.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: No dedicated work-commute bicycle — Velo-Pauschale may still apply per Zurich rules if distance qualifies.

verbal_knowledge.answer: No, I only work at Google. No freelance work on the side.
No, I don't own a car. I live in Zurich city so I don't need one.
I rent my apartment at Bederstrasse 45. I don't own any property.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: No real estate, no Eigenmietwert, no mortgage interest deduction.

verbal_knowledge.answer: Yes, I maxed out my VIAC 3a this year. I contribute the maximum allowed every year.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: VIAC confirmation = CHF 7,056 (maximum for BVG-insured employees)

verbal_knowledge.answer: I donated CHF 200 to the Swiss Red Cross (SRK) in March. That's the only donation I made this year.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: CHF 200 to SRK qualifies (above CHF 100 threshold). Shows in bank statement March 2025.

verbal_knowledge.answer: No major medical expenses this year. Just the normal Krankenkasse premiums.
No, I don't invest in crypto. I keep it simple with a savings account.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: No crypto wealth or income to declare.

verbal_knowledge.answer: I don't have any investment portfolio — just a regular savings account at the bank.
verbal_knowledge.tax_relevance: No securities to declare. Only bank interest income.

clarifications.answer: I have a ZVV Jahresabonnement — the annual pass for all zones in Zurich. I paid CHF 2,840 for it. I also sometimes cycle to work, so there might be a Velo-Pauschale on top of that.
clarifications.tax_relevance: Fahrkosten = ZVV Jahresabo CHF 2,840 + Velo-Pauschale CHF 700 = CHF 3,540 total

clarifications.answer: Google has a subsidized canteen — I eat there every day. I think that means I get the CHF 1,600 verpflegung deduction. Field 14.1 on my Lohnausweis is marked as Ja.
I'm not exactly sure what the Pauschale calculation is — you'd need to calculate 3% of my net salary from the Lohnausweis.
clarifications.tax_relevance: 3% of Nettolohn (field 12 = CHF 125,505.40) = CHF 3,765.16 → rounded to CHF 3,782 when using brutto minus AHV minus BVG. Ground truth = 3782.

clarifications.answer: I have one savings account. The balance at year-end was about CHF 150,000 — you can see the exact amount in my bank statement.
clarifications.tax_relevance: Last row of bank_statement.csv Dec 31 = CHF 150,806.68
